Hydra Scheduler — Triggers

Hydra Scheduler triggers determine when a scheduled task runs. Cron-style Hydra Scheduler triggers use the standard five-field syntax for periodic task dispatch (minute, hour, day-of-month, month, day-of-week). Event-based Hydra Scheduler triggers fire on filesystem events, message-queue events, or HTTP webhook calls. Multiple Hydra Scheduler triggers can attach to the same task; Hydra Scheduler debounces concurrent firings to avoid duplicate task dispatch.
